writeup: The Buffalo Bills were in full swing during the final week of Phase 3 OTAs on June 2, 2026, with key players like Ed Oliver and Christian Benford drawing attention on the practice field. Offensive coordinator Pete Carmichael took center stage in media availability, offering insight into the offensive philosophy being installed by first-year head coach Joe Brady. The session signaled an important juncture for the Bills as they fine-tuned their scheme ahead of mandatory minicamp set to begin June 9. With Brady's offensive vision beginning to take shape, the Bills faithful are closely watching how the new system meshes with Buffalo's talented roster.

articles.title: Bills OTAs | Ed Oliver & Christian Benford practice, OC Pete Carmichael on offensive philosophy of Head Coach Joe Brady
